sentences.en: We need to improve our activation rate before scaling acquisition spend.
sentences.zh: 在扩大获客支出之前，我们需要先提升激活率。

sentences.en: The referral program contributed 18% of new sign-ups last quarter.
sentences.zh: 推荐计划在上季度贡献了18%的新注册用户。

sentences.en: Our cost per acquisition dropped by 22% after optimizing the landing page.
sentences.zh: 优化落地页后，我们的获客成本下降了22%。

sentences.en: Let us A/B test the onboarding flow to reduce first-week churn.
sentences.zh: 我们来对新手引导流程做A/B测试，以减少首周流失。

sentences.en: The push notification opt-in rate on iOS is significantly lower than Android.
sentences.zh: iOS上的推送通知授权率明显低于Android。

example.en: User activation is the most critical step in the growth funnel.
example.zh: 用户激活是增长漏斗中最关键的一步。

example.en: Paid acquisition channels are becoming more expensive each year.
example.zh: 付费获客渠道每年都在变贵。

example.en: Referral traffic has the highest conversion rate among all channels.
example.zh: 推荐流量在所有渠道中转化率最高。

example.en: A smooth onboarding experience reduces early drop-off significantly.
example.zh: 流畅的新手引导体验能显著减少早期流失。

example.en: We redesigned the opt-in prompt to explain the value of notifications.
example.zh: 我们重新设计了授权弹窗，说明推送通知的价值。

sentences.en: The feature adoption rate is only 12%, which suggests a discoverability issue.
sentences.zh: 功能采用率只有12%，说明存在可发现性问题。

sentences.en: We should track time-to-value as a leading indicator of retention.
sentences.zh: 我们应该把首次价值达成时间作为留存的先行指标来追踪。

sentences.en: The API response time degraded after the last deployment.
sentences.zh: 上次部署后，API响应时间出现了退化。

sentences.en: Our DAU to MAU ratio indicates strong user engagement.
sentences.zh: 我们的DAU/MAU比值显示用户粘性很强。

sentences.en: The product roadmap needs to balance quick wins with long-term bets.
sentences.zh: 产品路线图需要在速赢项目和长期押注之间取得平衡。

example.en: Feature adoption is measured by the percentage of active users who use it weekly.
example.zh: 功能采用率通过每周使用该功能的活跃用户百分比来衡量。

example.en: Poor discoverability is the top reason features go unused.
example.zh: 可发现性差是功能无人使用的首要原因。

example.en: The system operated in a degraded state for two hours.
example.zh: 系统在性能退化状态下运行了两个小时。

example.en: Push notifications increased daily engagement by 15%.
example.zh: 推送通知使日均互动率提升了15%。

example.en: The Q3 roadmap focuses on international expansion features.
example.zh: Q3路线图聚焦于国际化扩张功能。

sentences.en: The forward P/E ratio suggests the stock is trading at a premium to its peers.
sentences.zh: 远期市盈率表明该股票相对同行存在溢价。

sentences.en: Operating margin expanded by 3 percentage points year over year.
sentences.zh: 营业利润率同比扩大了3个百分点。

sentences.en: The company raised $200 million in a Series C round at a $2 billion valuation.
sentences.zh: 该公司以20亿美元估值完成了2亿美元的C轮融资。

sentences.en: Dividend yield remains attractive compared to fixed-income alternatives.
sentences.zh: 与固定收益替代品相比，股息率仍然具有吸引力。

sentences.en: Revenue beat consensus estimates by 8% driven by strong international growth.
sentences.zh: 受强劲的国际增长推动，营收超出市场一致预期8%。

example.en: Investors are willing to pay a premium for companies with strong moats.
example.zh: 投资者愿意为拥有强大护城河的公司支付溢价。

example.en: Gross margin improved after renegotiating supplier contracts.
example.zh: 重新谈判供应商合同后，毛利率有所改善。

example.en: The startup's valuation tripled in just 18 months.
example.zh: 这家创业公司的估值在短短18个月内翻了三倍。

example.en: The board approved a quarterly dividend of $0.50 per share.
example.zh: 董事会批准了每股0.50美元的季度股息。

example.en: Analyst consensus expects earnings growth of 15% next year.
example.zh: 分析师一致预期明年盈利增长15%。

sentences.en: We should align on priorities before assigning tasks to the sprint.
sentences.zh: 在分配冲刺任务之前，我们应该先统一优先级。

sentences.en: The new hire is ramping up faster than expected thanks to the buddy system.
sentences.zh: 由于伙伴制度，新员工上手速度比预期更快。

sentences.en: Cross-functional collaboration broke down during the last release cycle.
sentences.zh: 在上一个发布周期中，跨职能协作出现了问题。

sentences.en: I want to give you some constructive feedback on the presentation.
sentences.zh: 我想就你的演示给一些建设性的反馈。

sentences.en: The team retrospective surfaced several process bottlenecks we need to address.
sentences.zh: 团队复盘暴露了几个我们需要解决的流程瓶颈。

example.en: It is important to align the team on the definition of done.
example.zh: 让团队就完成标准达成一致非常重要。

example.en: New engineers usually take three months to fully ramp up.
example.zh: 新工程师通常需要三个月才能完全上手。

example.en: Cross-functional teams deliver faster because they reduce handoffs.
example.zh: 跨职能团队交付更快，因为减少了交接环节。

example.en: Constructive feedback focuses on behavior, not personality.
example.zh: 建设性反馈关注行为，而非性格。

example.en: We hold a retrospective after every major project to capture learnings.
example.zh: 我们在每个重大项目后都会做复盘，以总结经验。

sentences.en: Our competitive advantage lies in the network effects of the platform.
sentences.zh: 我们的竞争优势在于平台的网络效应。

sentences.en: We are entering the Southeast Asian market with a localization-first approach.
sentences.zh: 我们以本地化优先的策略进入东南亚市场。

sentences.en: The total addressable market for this segment is estimated at $50 billion.
sentences.zh: 该细分市场的总可寻址市场规模估计为500亿美元。

sentences.en: We need to diversify revenue streams to reduce dependence on a single product.
sentences.zh: 我们需要多元化收入来源，以减少对单一产品的依赖。

sentences.en: The pivot from B2C to B2B was the turning point for the company.
sentences.zh: 从B2C转向B2B是公司的转折点。

example.en: Social platforms benefit from strong network effects as more users join.
example.zh: 随着更多用户加入，社交平台受益于强大的网络效应。

example.en: Localization goes beyond translation to include cultural adaptation.
example.zh: 本地化不仅仅是翻译，还包括文化适配。

example.en: The serviceable addressable market is a more realistic measure than the total.
example.zh: 可服务的可寻址市场是比总量更现实的衡量指标。

example.en: Smart investors diversify their portfolio across asset classes.
example.zh: 聪明的投资者会跨资产类别分散投资组合。

example.en: The company pivoted from hardware to a software subscription model.
example.zh: 该公司从硬件转型为软件订阅模式。
